taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Python, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Python:1.0, Scikit-learn:1.0, XGBoost:0.0, LightGBM:0.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years experience building and deploying ML models in production environments, Strong proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (scikit-learn, XGBoost/LightGBM, PyTorch), Experience with time-series forecasting methods (ARIMA, Prophet, gradient boosting, neural forecasters), Familiarity with NLP pipelines: text classification, named entity recognition, document parsing, or sentiment analysis, Production ML infrastructure: model serving, feature stores, monitoring, retraining workflows, and deployment into existing CI/CD systems (including unit tests and integration tests), SQL proficiency and experience with data pipeline tools (Airflow, dbt, or similar), Ability to communicate model behavior and limitations to non-technical stakeholders
core_responsibilities: Design, deploy, and scale systems at the core of the AI Economics platform, Own the end-to-end ML lifecycle for production systems including demand and cost forecasting models, supplier reliability prediction, NLP pipelines, and real-time cost calculation engines, Collaborate closely with economists on causal inference methodology, with data engineers on feature pipelines, and with product teams to translate model outputs into actionable customer-facing tools, Monitor performance of models in production and iterate based on real-world feedback
job_summary: Auger is an autonomous operating system for supply chains, and they are seeking an Applied Scientist to design, deploy, and scale systems for their AI Economics Team. This role involves owning the end-to-end ML lifecycle for production systems and collaborating with various teams to translate model outputs into actionable tools for customers.
